name: token-economy
description: Cut INPUT/orchestration tokens for multi-agent work, plus output discipline for the main thread. Mechanisms: discover-once context-pack (single repo scan, file:line map), terse read-only analysis lenses (no Edit/Write enforces read-only), a frugal output-style (result-first, no narration), a pluggable memory adapter (search-before/write-after, no races), and cap+cache. Complements caveman (output-style compression) — they stack.
